name: marketplace_v1
description: Multi-vendor marketplace with sellers, products, orders
create_sql:
-- Schema: marketplace_v1 (Multi-vendor marketplace with sellers, products, orders)

CREATE TABLE users (
  user_id INT PK,
  email VARCHAR,
  full_name VARCHAR,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  country VARCHAR,
  is_active BOOL
);

CREATE TABLE sellers (
  seller_id INT PK,
  user_id INT FK(users),
  shop_name VARCHAR,
  rating DECIMAL(3,2),
  total_sales INT,
  joined_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE categories (
  category_id INT PK,
  name VARCHAR,
  parent_id INT FK(categories)
);

CREATE TABLE products (
  product_id INT PK,
  seller_id INT FK(sellers),
  category_id INT FK(categories),
  title VARCHAR,
  price DECIMAL(10,2),
  stock_qty INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  is_listed BOOL
);

CREATE TABLE orders (
  order_id INT PK,
  user_id INT FK(users),
  status VARCHAR,
  total_amount DECIMAL(10,2),
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  shipped_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE order_items (
  item_id INT PK,
  order_id INT FK(orders),
  product_id INT FK(products),
  quantity INT,
  unit_price DECIMAL(10,2)
);

CREATE TABLE reviews (
  review_id INT PK,
  product_id INT FK(products),
  user_id INT FK(users),
  rating INT,
  body TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP
);
